subcodes.first_line: O ye who thirst for the truth! Iran is in ruins; indeed, all parties have taken an axe in hand
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه حقیقت ایران ویرانست و جمیع احزاب فی الحقیقه تیشه بدست گرفته بریشه این
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
